scripts.test:security: mkdir -p SCANNERS && snyk test --json-file-output=SCANNERS/snyk.json && npx snyk-to-html -i SCANNERS/snyk.json -o SCANNERS/snyk.html
scripts.test:sast: mkdir -p SCANNERS && semgrep scan --config auto --sarif --output SCANNERS/semgrep.sarif && npx @semgrep/sarif-to-html SCANNERS/semgrep.sarif > SCANNERS/semgrep.html
scripts.test:dast: mkdir -p SCANNERS && docker run --rm -v ${PWD}:/zap/wrk/:rw -t ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-baseline.py -t http://localhost:3000 -r relatorio-dast.html && mv relatorio-dast.html SCANNERS/
scripts.test:all: npm run lint && npm run test:sast && npm run test:security && npm run test:dast
